import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion'; import { Search, SlidersHorizontal, MapPin, Heart, X, ShieldCheck, Zap, Info } from 'lucide-react'; export default function Explore() { const [selectedItem, setSelectedItem] = useState(null); const [activeCategory, setActiveCategory] = useState('All'); const listings = [ { id: 1, title: 'Power Drill', category: 'Tools', wtk: 40, dist: '0.8 km', user: 'Rahul K.', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504148455328-c376907d081c?auto=format&fit=crop&w=500&q=80', description: 'Heavy duty brushless motor drill. Perfect for concrete or woodwork. Includes 2 batteries.' }, { id: 2, title: 'Python Tutoring', category: 'Education', wtk: 150, dist: '1.2 km', user: 'Sara M.', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1515879218367-8466d910aaa4?auto=format&fit=crop&w=500&q=80', description: 'One-on-one session covering data science basics. Suitable for absolute beginners.' }, { id: 3, title: 'Yoga Session', category: 'Wellness', wtk: 60, dist: '1.5 km', user: 'Priya S.', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1544367567-0f2fcb009e0b?auto=format&fit=crop&w=500&q=80', description: '60-minute Vinyasa flow focusing on flexibility and breath-work. Open to all levels.' }, { id: 4, title: 'MacBook Pro', category: 'Tech', wtk: 500, dist: '2.5 km', user: 'Amal V.', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517336714731-489689fd1ca8?auto=format&fit=crop&w=500&q=80', description: 'M1 Chip, 16GB RAM. Excellent condition. Looking for high-value skill exchange.' } ]; const categories = ['All', 'Tools', 'Education', 'Tech', 'Wellness']; return (
{/* Search Header */}
{/* Category Filter */}
{categories.map(cat => ( ))}
{/* Item Grid */}
{listings.filter(i => activeCategory === 'All' || i.category === activeCategory).map(item => (
{item.category}

{item.title}

{item.dist} away • {item.user}

{item.wtk}

WTK

 ))}
{/* WORKING MODAL POPUP */} {selectedItem && (
{selectedItem.category}

{selectedItem.title}

{selectedItem.description}

Owner

{selectedItem.user}

Distance

{selectedItem.dist}

{selectedItem.wtk} WTK
)}
); }
